title: Soledad
writer: Edmundo Báez, Silvia Guerrico, Miguel Zacarías
actors: Libertad Lamarque, René Cardona, Marga López
plot: Soledad is a housemaid of Argentine origin who works in a Mexican hacienda. Her employer's son cheats on her and falsely marries her. Realizing the lie, Soledad, who is pregnant, runs away.
